message.content:
@startuml
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam linetype ortho

interface Invoker
interface Command {
  execute()
  undo()
}
interface Client
class ConcreteCommand {
  execute()
  undo()
}
interface Receiver {
  action()
}

Invoker --> Command

ConcreteCommand ..|> Command

Client --> ConcreteCommand
Client --> Receiver

Receiver --> ConcreteCommand

note left of Invoker
调用者持有命令对象，
并在某刻调用execute()
end note

note top of Command
调用命令对象的execute()
就可以让接收者进行动作
end note

note right of Client
这个客户负责创建一个
ConcreteCommand，并
设置其接受者
end note

note left of ConcreteCommand
定义了动作和接收者之间
的绑定关系，调用者只需
要调用execute()就可以
发出请求
end note

note right of Receiver
接收者知道如何实现这个请求
end note
@enduml
